18.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

18.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
18.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

18.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
18.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

18.gl: to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen
18.kj: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.

18.gl: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand
Jehozabad, the name of three Israelites

19.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
19.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

19.gl: properly, separation; by implication, a part of the body, branch of atree, bar forcarrying; figuratively, chief of a city; especially (with prepositional prefix) as an adverb, apart, only, besides
19.kj: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.

19.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
19.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
19.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

19.gl: a fortification, castle, or fortified city; figuratively, a defender
19.dv: also (in plural) feminine (Daniel 11:l5) מִבְצָרָה; from H1219 (בָּצַר);

19.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory

19.kj: an-(the) other; one sort, so, some, such, them, these (same), they, this, those, thus, which, who(-m).
